Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Strunk of Gordon & Rees (986.5900) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court denied Mr. Strunk's request to take the matter off calendar and adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifted the burden of producing based on the defense of the statute of limitations. CCP 361 applies and the Oregon statute of limitations, 30.907, establishes a 2 year limitations period that had expired when plaintiff brought suit in California. Cossman v. Daimlerchrysler Corp. (2003) 108 Cal. App. 4th 370. Defendant has demonstrated that plaintiff's kidney cancer is the result of plaintiff's exposure to asbestos, Undisputed Material Facts 11-15, as well as the testimony of Dr. Gotchall. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
